zh-TW: 活動簡介
en-US: Introduction

zh-TW: 僑委會為使海外青年活動與時俱進，落實推動國際志工服務精神，鼓勵海外志工投入國內英語教學活動，2004年起與金車教育基金會合作辦理「尋找ABC史懷哲－海外華裔青年暑期返鄉英語教學志願服務」，邀請有服務意願之海外僑青來臺服務。
en-US: To ensure that overseas youth activities keep pace with the times and to implement the spirit of international volunteer service, the Overseas Community Affairs Council (OCAC) has been cooperating with the King Car Education Foundation since 2004 to organize the "Finding ABC Schweitzer - Overseas Chinese Youth Summer English Teaching Volunteer Service" program, inviting overseas youth with a willingness to serve to come to Taiwan.

zh-TW: 鑑於運用海外資源來臺投入志願服務活動，深具正面意義，並可配合政府雙語政府及人才培育計畫，鼓勵海外僑青投入國內英語教學活動，提昇偏遠或教學資源缺乏地區國小、國中學生及弱勢族群學習英語機會，本會與教育部於2006年共同規劃辦理「海外青年英語服務營」，活動為期4週，第1週教育訓練，第2、3週到校進行英語教學、第4週寶島參訪，由本會負責招募海外僑青來臺，教育部則負責志工教育訓練及在校英語教學服務。因辦理成效良好，逐年擴大辦理規模，2014年起並邀請客家委員會及民間NGO單位參與辦理，2016年原住民族委員會亦加入辦理行列。
en-US: Given the positive significance of utilizing overseas resources for volunteer service activities in Taiwan, and its alignment with the government's bilingual government and talent development programs, which encourage overseas youth to participate in domestic English teaching activities and improve English learning opportunities for elementary and junior high school students and disadvantaged groups in remote or resource-scarce areas, our association, in collaboration with the Ministry of Education, planned and implemented the "English Teaching Volunteer Service Program for Overseas Youth" in 2006. The four-week program includes training in the first week, English teaching in schools in the second and third weeks, and a visit to Taiwan in the fourth week. Our association is responsible for recruiting overseas youth to come to Taiwan, while the Ministry of Education is responsible for volunteer training and in-school English teaching services. Due to its effectiveness, the program has been expanded annually. Since 2014, the Hakka Affairs Council and NGOs have been invited to participate, and in 2016, the Council of Indigenous Peoples also joined the program.

zh-TW: 「2025年海外青年英語服務營」於114年7月5日至8月1日辦理，計有來自美國、加拿大、英國、澳洲、南非、義大利、法國、新加坡等22個國家共415名海外志工(包括臺灣華語文學習中心TCML及海外主流學校學生)至國內68所國、中小學服務(教育部64校、客委會4校)，國內有3,026名學童受益。截至目前計有超過7,000名海外志工來臺參加，國內計有逾50,000名學童受惠。
en-US: The "English Teaching Volunteer Service Program for Overseas Youth 2025" was held from July 5th to August 1st, 2025. A total of 415 overseas volunteers (including students from the Taiwan Chinese Language Learning Center (TCML) and mainstream overseas schools) from 22 countries including the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Italy, France, and Singapore served in 68 elementary and junior high schools in Taiwan (64 schools under the Ministry of Education and 4 schools under the Hakka Affairs Council). 3,026 students in Taiwan benefited. To date, over 7,000 overseas volunteers have participated in the program, and over 50,000 students in Taiwan have benefited.

zh-TW: 本項活動成效卓著，廣受海內外好評，除成功引導海外青年投入臺灣志願服務外，亦使海外青年更貼近臺灣，與臺灣產生情感聯繫，達成促進國際青年交流、縮小國內城鄉差距、提升國內學童英語學習動機及創新僑教服務等多重目標。
en-US: This activity is highly effective and widely praised both at home and abroad, in addition to successfully guiding overseas youth to join the volunteer service in Taiwan, but also to make overseas youth closer to Taiwan, and Taiwan to generate emotional ties, to achieve multiple goals of promoting international youth exchanges, narrowing the gap between urban and rural areas in the countryside, enhancing the English learning motivation of the domestic schoolchildren, and innovating overseas Chinese education services.

zh-TW: 海外青年英語服務營營隊規則
en-US: Regulation of English Teaching Volunteer Service Program for Overseas Youth

zh-TW: 壹、一般規定
en-US: 1<sup>st</sup> - Ordinary Regulation

zh-TW: 請志工充分瞭解：本活動非參訪性質，來臺後須從事教育活動，部分服務學校及居住環境位於偏鄉。言行應合乎禮儀，衣著整潔，認真負責，確實遵守營隊規則。
en-US: Volunteers are requested to fully understand that this activity is not a visit; upon arrival in Taiwan, participants will be required to engage in educational activities, and some of the schools and accommodations will be located in rural areas. Volunteers should behave politely, dress neatly, be responsible, and strictly adhere to the camp rules.

zh-TW: 欲參加活動之青年如有特殊疾病(包括心臟病、腦血管疾病、糖尿病、精神病癲癇症、傳染疾病)或其他可能發生身體重大不適症狀(如懷孕或過敏等)足以影響活動之進行者，請勿報名參加。否則如因此發生意外事故應自行負責。
en-US: Young people wishing to participate in the activity should not register if they have any special medical conditions (including heart disease, cerebrovascular disease, diabetes, mental illness, epilepsy, infectious diseases) or other symptoms that may cause significant physical discomfort (such as pregnancy or allergies) that could affect the activity. Otherwise, they will be solely responsible for any accidents that occur as a result.

zh-TW: 主辦單位將為參加者投保定額意外險或旅遊平安險、意外醫療險與公共意外責任險，保險範圍不包括參加者因疾病衍生之醫療或參加者個人行動導致之意外。建議參加志工可加購其他不同保險。
en-US: The organizers will provide participants with fixed-amount accident insurance or travel accident insurance, accidental medical insurance, and public liability insurance. The insurance coverage does not include medical expenses arising from illness or accidents caused by the participant's personal actions. Volunteers are encouraged to purchase additional insurance.

zh-TW: 服務期間志工因疾病送醫治療，應自行負擔醫藥費，志工及其家長不得向主(承)辦單位暨服務學校(單位)提出任何要求，身體有任何不適請立即向輔導員反映，並聯繫家長或在臺聯絡人。倘拒絕就醫，須填寫不就醫證明。
en-US: If a volunteer needs medical treatment due to illness during the service period, they should bear the medical expenses themselves. Volunteers and their parents should not make any demands on the organizer or the school/unit they are serving. If any discomfort occurs, please immediately report it to the counselor and contact your parents or contact person in Taiwan. If you refuse medical treatment, you must fill out a non-medical treatment certificate.

zh-TW: 志工參加活動前應辦妥個人醫療保險，未依規定辦理者，一律不接受報到。
en-US: Volunteers should have personal medical insurance before participating in the activity. Those who have not done so will not be accepted for registration.

zh-TW: 志工參加活動應無異議接受分發之服務營次及學校(單位)；分發確定後，不得藉任何理由要求更改。
en-US: Volunteers should accept the assigned service camp and school (unit) without objection when participating in activities; once the assignment is confirmed, no changes may be requested for any reason.

zh-TW: 參加活動之志工俟班機確定後，請儘速上網填寫行前調查表。
en-US: Volunteers participating in the activity should fill out the pre-departure survey online as soon as their flight is confirmed.

zh-TW: 志工攜帶行李應力求簡單輕便，不得攜帶任何違禁品及保育類動物製品。
en-US: Volunteers should carry simple and lightweight luggage and must not bring any prohibited items or animal products.

zh-TW: 志工參加活動如有提早報到或延遲離營，其所需膳宿、交通等費用請自理。
en-US: Volunteers who arrive early or leave late are responsible for their own food, accommodation, and transportation expenses.

zh-TW: 營隊活動期間志工必須守時、遵守團隊紀律及主(承)辦單位暨服務學校(單位)之各項規定，因病或其他重大原因無法上課或參加活動，須事前向主辦單位暨服務學校(單位)請假(備家長同意證明)；除病假外，不得無故缺席或不假外出，否則將取消參加資格，且不核發志工服務證明。
en-US: During the camp activities, volunteers must be punctual, abide by team discipline and all regulations of the organizer and the school (unit) they serve. If a volunteer is unable to attend class or participate in activities due to illness or other serious reasons, they must apply for leave in advance to the organizer and the school (unit) they serve (with proof of parental consent). Except for sick leave, volunteers may not be absent or go out without permission. Otherwise, their participation will be cancelled and they will not be issued a volunteer service certificate.

zh-TW: 志工於活動期間須於晚間 10:30 前返回自己房間，不得逗留在其他房間或外出。
en-US: Volunteers must return to their rooms by 10:30 p.m. during the event and are not allowed to linger in other rooms or go out.

zh-TW: 志工活動期間不接受輔導及不遵守規定，致發生意外事故，應自行負責，主(承)辦單位暨服務學校(單位)除有重大過失，對於該團員不負任何賠償責任。如有任何爭議皆依中華民國法律處理。
en-US: Volunteers are not responsible for any accidents that occur during the activity if they do not accept guidance or comply with the rules. The organizers and service schools (units) will not be held liable for any compensation to the volunteers unless they are grossly negligent. Any disputes will be handled in accordance with the laws of the Republic of China.

zh-TW: 參加活動之志工來臺後，應遵守活動規定，若有違反服務手冊規定，主(承)辦單位暨服務學校(單位)有權中止其繼續參加活動，並通知其家長及在臺監護人或連繫人帶回。
en-US: Volunteers participating in the activity should abide by the activity rules after arriving in Taiwan. If they violate the service manual, the organizer and the school (unit) providing the service have the right to terminate their participation in the activity and notify their parents and guardians or contacts in Taiwan to take them back.

zh-TW: 活動期間禁止打架、喝酒、賭博、吸毒及從事其他違法行為及活動。
en-US: Fighting, drinking alcohol, gambling, drug use, and other illegal activities are prohibited during the event.

zh-TW: 志工因違法行為或其他歸責於志工之事由，致遭政府治安機關羈押或留置時，應由該志工自行負責，與主(承)辦單位暨服務學校(單位)無涉。並應負責賠償本活動主(承)辦單位暨服務學校(單位)因此所受之一切損害。活動期間應妥善使用公物，不當使用或故意毀損應負賠償責任。
en-US: If a volunteer is detained or imprisoned by government law enforcement agencies due to illegal activities or other reasons attributable to the volunteer, the volunteer shall be solely responsible, and the organizer and the school/unit they serve shall bear no responsibility. The volunteer shall also be liable for all damages suffered by the organizer and the school/unit they serve as a result. Volunteers should use public property properly during the event; improper use or intentional damage will result in liability for compensation.

zh-TW: 因應公共衛生需求考量，志工於活動期間應做好個人衛生，除飲食需求外，建議視需要配戴口罩。
en-US: In consideration of public health needs, volunteers should maintain personal hygiene during the event and are advised to wear masks as needed, except when eating.

zh-TW: 任何疑慮或投訴應直接向輔導員提出，輔導員會立即處理或轉交給相關單位。
en-US: Any doubts or complaints should be raised directly to the counselor, who will handle them immediately or forward them to the relevant department.

zh-TW:
衣著規範：
活動期間(包含教育訓練週及到校服務)，所有志工必須穿著大會所發上衣制服和長褲/及膝褲子/牛仔褲(不允許穿破洞牛仔褲)。基於安全考量，活動期間不允許穿人字拖。寶島參訪週，志工可自由搭配服裝，惟必須合宜。
en-US:
Dress Code:
During the event (including the training week and school service), all volunteers must wear the uniform top and trousers/knee-length trousers/jeans provided by the organizers (ripped jeans are not allowed). For safety reasons, flip-flops are not allowed during the event. During the Taiwan Visit Week, volunteers are free to choose their own clothing, but it must be appropriate.

zh-TW: 貳、教育訓練週期間相關規定
en-US: 2<sup>nd</sup> - Regulation during the Education Training Week

zh-TW: 用餐規定
en-US: Dining regulations

zh-TW: 全體學員必須準時到達餐廳用餐，全員到齊或宣布全體學員開動後始可用餐，無故遲到而未能用餐者自行負責。用餐時間：早餐 8:00，午餐 12:00，晚餐 17:00。
en-US: All participants must arrive at the restaurant on time for meals. Meals may only begin after everyone has arrived or after an announcement that all participants are ready to eat. Those who are late without a valid reason and miss a meal will be responsible for their own consequences. Meal times: Breakfast 8:00 AM, Lunch 12:00 PM, Dinner 5:00 PM.

zh-TW: 全體學員必須依據分配桌次就座用餐，不可私自調整用餐座位。
en-US: All trainees must sit at their assigned tables for meals and are not allowed to change their seating arrangements without permission.

zh-TW: 用餐時保持衣著整齊，不可穿拖鞋、短褲及內衣。
en-US: Please dress neatly while dining; do not wear slippers, shorts, or underwear.

zh-TW: 住宿規定
en-US: Accommodation regulations

zh-TW: 離開寢室時務必上鎖，各寢室房卡離開各寢室時繳回櫃臺，因未上鎖發生財物遺失者應自行負責。若未繳回致鑰匙遺失將收取新臺幣300 元更換費用。
en-US: Please lock your room when leaving. Return your room key to the counter when leaving your room. You are responsible for any loss of belongings due to leaving your room unlocked. A replacement fee of NT$300 will be charged if the key is lost due to failure to return it.

zh-TW: 個人寢具、衣物與其他用品，必須保持整潔。
en-US: Personal bedding, clothing, and other items must be kept clean.

zh-TW: 就寢時間為每日 22:30 至次日 7:00。每晚 10:30 查房點名，查房之後不可離開宿舍，若私自離開宿舍或營隊而受傷或滋事者，本營隊一概不負責。
en-US: Bedtime is from 10:30 PM to 7:00 AM the next day. Roll call will be conducted at 10:30 PM every night. After the roll call, students are not allowed to leave their dormitories. The camp will not be responsible for any injuries or disturbances caused by students who leave their dormitories or camps without permission.

zh-TW: 活動期間不可將訪客帶入宿舍或留宿。查房後謝絕所有訪客。
en-US: Visitors are not allowed to be brought into the dormitory or stay overnight during the event. All visitors will be refused after room checks.

zh-TW: 未經許可，任何時候都不允許交換房間。
en-US: Room swapping is not permitted at any time without permission.

en-US: Chewing gum or eating is prohibited.

zh-TW: 其他規定
en-US: Other Regulation

zh-TW: 教育訓練週探視時間：志工親友可在每天 12：00-13：00、17：00-18：00 及 20:00-21:30 至指定地點/區域探視志工。請志工訪客提前向承辦單位(輔導員)提出申請，並遵守本活動所有規定。
en-US: Visiting hours during the Education and Training Week: Volunteer family and friends may visit volunteers at designated locations/areas daily from 12:00-13:00, 17:00-18:00, and 20:00-21:30. Volunteer visitors are requested to apply to the organizing unit (counselor) in advance and abide by all regulations of this event.

zh-TW: 除瓶裝水外，請勿攜帶其他飲料進入教室。上課中請勿嚼食口香糖或飲食，零食請於休息時間在教室外使用。
en-US: Please do not bring any beverages into the classroom except bottled water. Do not chew gum or eat during class; please consume snacks outside the classroom during breaks.

zh-TW: 志工若於上課或任何其他活動期間，有特殊需求需返回宿舍者，應由生活輔導員陪同前往，並於完成後立即返回教室或或活動地點。
en-US: If a volunteer has a special need to return to the dormitory during class or any other activity, they should be accompanied by a student counselor and return to the classroom or activity location immediately afterward.

zh-TW: 上課/用餐/活動無故遲到，5 分鐘內記點 1 點，5 至 10 分鐘記點 2 點，11 至15 分鐘記點 3 點，超過 15 分鐘視同未到記點 10 點。
en-US: If you are late for class, meals, or activities without a valid reason, you will be marked with 1 point if you are less than 5 minutes late, 2 points if you are 5 to 10 minutes late, 3 points if you are 11 to 15 minutes late, and 10 points if you are more than 15 minutes late, which will be considered as not being there.

id: .page-content .regulation .regulation-training-week > ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(5) > ul > li:nth-of-type(1) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-of-type(1) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-of-type(2)

en-US: Those who are absent from class, meals, or activities without a valid reason or leave their seats for more than 15 minutes will be considered as absent without a valid reason and will receive 10 points.

id: .page-content .regulation .regulation-training-week > ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(5) > ul > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-of-type(1)

en-US: The point system will take effect immediately upon the start of the camp activities. Daily points/individual cumulative points will be posted on the bulletin board next to the service desk before noon every day.

en-US: If you disagree with your score recording results, the service desk provides an appeal form. You can fill out the form and return it to the service desk within one day. The form must be signed by the on-duty counselor; otherwise, it will not be accepted.

zh-TW: 請於5月10日前至海外志工報到調查表(https://forms.gle/jHoaFoba1BuV9Vws9)中事先填覆告知。
en-US: Please fill out the Pre-arrival Survey(https://forms.gle/jHoaFoba1BuV9Vws9) in advance before May 10th.

zh-TW: 抵達臺灣
en-US: Arrive Taiwan

zh-TW: 我們機場接送的時間為臺灣時間7月4日(星期六)上午9點(09:00)至下午5點(17:00)，謝謝。若有其它時段請於調查表單中填覆並告知，以利承辦單位安排。
en-US: Our airport pick-up and drop-off service will be available from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Taiwan time on July 4th (Saturday). Thank you. If you have other available time slots, please fill out the survey form and let us know so that we can make the necessary arrangements.

zh-TW: 聯絡人：嚕啦啦旅行社 陳秀春 小姐(手機：0937-071035)
en-US: Contact Person: Ms. Chen Hsiu-chun, Lulala Travel Agency: 0937-071035

zh-TW: 欲至機場報到者，請於調查表內提供已確認之抵臺班機時刻，由承辦單位(嚕啦啦旅行社)派車接送；將視志工航班抵達情形安排接駁車班，非隨到隨接駁。
en-US: Participants who wish to be picked up at the airport are requested to provide their confirmed arrival flight information in advance in the “Pre-Arrival Survey”. Pick-up transportation will be arranged by the organizer, Lulala Travel Agency. Shuttle service will be scheduled based on the actual arrival times of volunteers’ flights and will not be provided on an immediate, walk-in basis.

zh-TW: 接機人員將持明顯手舉牌利於辨識
en-US: Airport pick-up staff will hold clearly visible signs for easy identification.

zh-TW: 送機
en-US: Drop off

zh-TW: 原則安排於7月31日(星期五)送機，但自7月30日(星期四)成果發表會(劍潭海外青年活動中心-111臺北市士林區中山北路四段16號)結束後，自下午(14:00)起即可離營，完成離營程序後將由承辦單位(嚕啦啦旅行社)派車接送至桃園機場。
en-US: The scheduled departure date is July 31 (Friday). However, starting from 2:00 PM on July 30 (Thursday), participants can leave the camp after the results presentation (Jiantan Overseas Youth Activity Center - No. 16, Section 4, Zhongshan North Road, Shilin District, Taipei City 111). After completing the departure procedures, the organizer (Lulala Travel Agency) will arrange a car to pick them up and take them to Taoyuan Airport.

zh-TW: 7月30日(星期四)離營者，當日接駁時段為14:00-17:00，建議購買7月30日當天19:00-22:00之間航班為宜。
en-US: For participants departing on Thursday, July 30, airport transfer service will be available between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM. It is recommended that they book flights departing between 7:00 PM and 10:00 PM on the same day.

zh-TW: 7月31日(星期五)離營者，當日接駁時段為08:00-12:00，建議購買7月31日13:00後航班。
en-US: For participants departing on Friday, July 31, airport transfer service will be available between 8:00 AM and 12:00 PM. It is recommended that they book flights departing after 1:00 PM.

zh-TW: 在臺親屬接送地點：劍潭海外青年活動中心(111臺北市士林區中山北路四段16號)。
en-US: Pick-up and drop-off location for relatives in Taiwan: Chientan Overseas Youth Activity Center (No. 16, Section 4, Zhongshan North Road, Shilin District, Taipei City 111).

zh-TW: 如有其他需求請事前告知，以利承辦單位聯絡安排。
en-US: If you have any other needs, please inform the organizer in advance so that the necessary arrangements can be made.

zh-TW: 飲食習慣相關問題
en-US: Food

zh-TW: 膳食安排以體驗臺灣膳食特色為主，團員有素食或特殊狀況需注意者，請一併告知，以便協調處理。
en-US: Meals will feature Taiwanese cuisine, allowing participants to experience authentic local flavors. Participants requiring vegetarian or special meals should notify the organizer in advance.

zh-TW: 服裝
en-US: Clothes Issue

zh-TW: 主辦單位將提供每人制服3件短袖T-shirt、帽子、便利雨衣。
en-US: The organizers will provide each participant with three short-sleeved T-shirts, a hat, and a raincoat.

zh-TW: 住宿
en-US: Accomodation

zh-TW: 首先，本活動旨為來臺進行偏鄉英語教學志願服務，有別一般的觀光旅遊，住宿地點難免因城鄉差距有所差異，敬請您見諒。
en-US: First of all, the purpose of this activity is to provide volunteer English teaching services in rural areas of Taiwan, which is different from general tourism. Please understand that the accommodation locations may vary due to urban-rural differences.

zh-TW: 教育訓練週(7/4-7/10)：臺北醫學大學信義校區(拇山學苑-學生宿舍)四人一室(110臺北市信義區吳興街250號)。
en-US: Education and Training Week (July 4-10): Taipei Medical University Xinyi Campus (Mushan Xueyuan - Student Dormitory), four people per room (No. 250, Wuxing Street, Xinyi District, Taipei City 110).

zh-TW: 提供個人住宿器具(枕頭、床墊、涼被或睡袋)。
en-US: Personal accommodations are provided (pillows, mattresses, blankets or sleeping bags).

zh-TW: 提供個人衣架*4及衛生紙。
en-US: Four personal hangers and toilet paper are provided.

zh-TW: 每寢公用吹風機、沐浴乳及洗髮精。
en-US: Each dormitory room shares hair dryers, shower gel, and shampoo.

zh-TW: 在校服務週(7/11-7/24)：依分發學校而定(可能是住在學校教室、寄宿家庭、校長宿舍、老師家中、民宿、飯店…皆有可能)。
en-US: School Service Week (July 11 - July 24): Depending on the school assigned (may include living in school classrooms, homestays, principal's dormitory, teachers' homes, guesthouses, hotels, etc.).

zh-TW: 寶島參訪週(7/25-7/29)：會依人數調整至少分為2條路線進行旅遊(中/南)，目前尚未分配，住宿地點則會安排在飯店或青年活動中心。
en-US: Taiwan Visit Week (July 25-29): Depending on the number of participants, the tour will be divided into at least two routes (Central/Southern Taiwan). The routes have not yet been assigned, and accommodations will be arranged in hotels or youth activity centers.

zh-TW: 成果發表及解散(7/29-7/31)：住宿地點安排在劍潭海外青年活動中心(111臺北市士林區中山北路四段16號)。
en-US: Results presentation and disbandment (July 29-31): Accommodation will be arranged at Jiantan Overseas Youth Activity Center (No. 16, Section 4, Zhongshan North Road, Shilin District, Taipei City 111).

zh-TW: 交通
en-US: Transportation

zh-TW: 除了7月4日及7月31日提供接/送機交通接駁服務外，7月10日教育訓練週結束後學校會安排交通接送至各校，北部地區學校會派車接送，中南部地區大部分同縣市學校會共乘大巴士，更遠的會搭乘臺灣高鐵。離島的學校已經替服務志工準備好志工的機票。7月27日學校會再將志工送至寶島旅遊集合地點，搭乘大巴士參加旅遊參訪活動，活動期間皆由主辦單位提供交通接送。
en-US: In addition to providing airport shuttle services on July 4th and July 31st, schools will arrange transportation to each school after the training week ends on July 10th. Schools in the northern region will provide their own buses, while most schools in the central and southern regions will share buses, and those further away will use the Taiwan High Speed ​​Rail. Schools on outlying islands have already prepared airfares for their volunteers. On July 27th, schools will transport volunteers to the designated meeting point for a tour of Taiwan, where they will board buses to participate in sightseeing activities. Transportation will be provided by the organizers throughout the activities.

zh-TW: 在學校教學服務前間的週末假日，學校老師會安排旅遊或城市探索活動，其他週一到週五教學結束後，志工應該會忙著準備隔天的教案和課程，沒有時間可以離開學校探索城市，也為了志工的安全，避免離開學校，謝謝。
en-US: On weekends and holidays before the school's teaching service, the school teachers will arrange outings or city exploration activities. On other days, from Monday to Friday after the teaching service, volunteers will be busy preparing lesson plans and courses for the next day and will not have time to leave the school to explore the city. For the safety of the volunteers, please avoid leaving the school. Thank you.

zh-TW: 活動期間7月4日至7月30日謝絕在臺親朋好友探視志工，因為活動行程滿滿，教育訓練週到晚上9點皆有課程，教學服務兩週週一至周五都要準備隔日教案和課程，週末學校皆有安排小旅行活動，依據往年的經驗，比較有經驗(來過1-2次)的志工，晚上備課通常最早晚上8點結束，第一次參加的志工，有時候會備課到晚上10-11點，如果親友晚上到學校探視，恐怕更會耽誤志工備課和休息的時間。
en-US: During the event period from July 4th to July 30th, visits from relatives and friends in Taiwan to volunteers are not permitted. The event schedule is packed, with training sessions until 9 pm every night. For the two weeks of teaching service, volunteers need to prepare lesson plans and courses for the next day from Monday to Friday. The school also arranges short trips on weekends. Based on past experience, more experienced volunteers (who have participated 1-2 times) usually finish preparing lessons at the earliest by 8 pm. Volunteers participating for the first time sometimes prepare lessons until 10-11 pm. If relatives and friends visit the school in the evening, it will likely further delay the volunteers' preparation and rest time.

zh-TW: 7月30日結業式因為志工人數眾多，還有學校師長要參加，座位區有限，不建議邀請眾多親朋好友前來觀禮，謝謝。
en-US: Due to the large number of volunteers and school teachers attending the graduation ceremony on July 30th, and the limited seating area, we do not recommend inviting many relatives and friends to attend. Thank you.

zh-TW: 僑民役男
en-US: Overseas Conscript

zh-TW: 僑民役男定義：年滿19歲~36歲之間，並同時持有中華民國(臺灣)護照與僑居國護照，以及在中華民國(臺灣)持有戶籍的男性。(簡單判定根據：請確認您的中華民國(臺灣)護照上是否有「身分證字號」欄位，若有，即代表您持有臺灣戶籍。)
en-US: Definition of overseas conscripts: Males aged 19 to 36 who simultaneously hold a Republic of China (Taiwan) passport and a passport of their country of residence, and who are registered residents of the Republic of China (Taiwan). (Simple criterion: Please check if your Republic of China (Taiwan) passport has an "Identity Card Number" field. If it does, it means you hold Taiwanese household registration.)

zh-TW: 若您持有僑民役男身分，請使用中華民國(臺灣)護照入境與出境。(由於中華電信提供的海外青年網路專案須使用僑居國護照出入境，因此僑民役男不適用該網路專案)
en-US: If you hold overseas conscript status, please use your Republic of China (Taiwan) passport for entry and exit. (Since the overseas youth internet service provided by Chunghwa Telecom requires the use of your country of residence passport for entry and exit, overseas conscripts are not eligible for this internet service.)

zh-TW: 若您本次入境前未申請過出境許可與出境核准，出境前須重新申請：
en-US: If you did not apply for an exit permit and exit approval before this entry, you must reapply before departure:

zh-TW: 向僑委會申請役政用華僑身分證明書
en-US: Apply to the Overseas Community Affairs Council for a Certificate of Overseas Chinese Status for Military Service

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(1) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(1)
zh-TW: 需填寫華僑身分證明申請書，若委託他人申請，則須加填委託書(委託人兩份都需親自簽名)
en-US: An application form for proof of overseas Chinese status must be completed. If someone else is applying on your behalf, a power of attorney must also be completed (both copies must be signed by the principal).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(1) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(2)
zh-TW: 備妥中華民國與居留國護照(不能用影本)，申請一次須工本費$200元新台幣
en-US: Prepare your Republic of China (Taiwan) and country of residence passports (photocopies are not acceptable). A processing fee of NT$200 is required for each application.

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(1) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3)
zh-TW: 至僑委會臨櫃申請(行政院中央聯合辦公大樓南棟(台北市中正區徐州路5號)3F)，等待半天至一天工作日即可領取。
en-US: You can apply in person at the Overseas Community Affairs Council (South Building, Joint Central Government Office Building, Executive Yuan, 3F) and wait half a day to a full working day to collect your documents.

zh-TW: 至內政部移民署僑民役男申請出境文件審查平臺申請出境許可
en-US: Apply for an exit permit through the Exit Document Review Platform of the National Immigration Agency, Ministry of the Interior.

zh-TW: 登入需填寫役男身份證字號、出生日期及中華民國(臺灣)護照號碼
en-US: To log in, you need to fill in your conscript's ID number, date of birth, and Republic of China (Taiwan) passport number.

en-US: Overseas Chinese Status Certificate (In addition to uploading a clearly identifiable photo, the validity period must also be filled in)

en-US: Overseas conscripts must upload their Republic of China passport and passport from their country of residence (in addition to filling in the passport number, a clearly identifiable photo and the expiration date are also required).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(5)
zh-TW: 僑民役男4個月內自僑居國出國的紀錄(最佳證明為自僑居地起飛的機票，且機票資訊必須要能清楚確認是僑民本人持有)
en-US: The overseas conscript's record of leaving the country of residence within the past 4 months (the best proof is a ticket departing from the country of residence, and the ticket information must clearly confirm that the overseas conscript is in possession of the ticket).

zh-TW: 申請後等待約一至兩個工作天後，可再次登入查詢申請結果(連絡電話：內政部役政司，02-85013928)
en-US: After submitting your application, you can log in again to check the results after approximately one to two business days (contact number: Ministry of the Interior, Conscription Department886-2-85013928).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(7)
zh-TW: 若僑民役男尚未建立兵籍資料，則需親自(視情況須由監護人陪伴)前往戶籍所在地戶政事務所辦理，完成後才能獲得出境許可
en-US: If a conscripted overseas Chinese has not yet established military service registration, he/she must personally (and may be accompanied by a guardian if necessary) go to the household registration office in his/her place of residence to complete the registration process before obtaining an exit permit.

zh-TW: 至內政部移民署各地服務站臨櫃申請出境核准
en-US: Apply for exit approval in person at any of the National Immigration Agency's service centers across the Ministry of the Interior.

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(1)
zh-TW: 須至服務站填寫申請書，若委託他人代理則須加填委任書(皆須本人親自簽名)，委任書須貼上委辦者身分證正反面影本(須自行影印)
en-US: You must fill out an application form at the service station. If you are authorizing someone else to act on your behalf, you must also fill out a power of attorney (both must be signed by the authorized person in person). The power of attorney must be accompanied by a photocopy of both sides of the authorized person's ID card (you must make the photocopy yourself).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(2)
zh-TW: 申請時須攜帶僑民役男中華民國(臺灣)護照、僑居國護照及役政用華僑身分證明書，且必須自行影印身分證明頁與役政用華僑身分證明書
en-US: When applying, the applicant must bring their Republic of China (Taiwan) passport, their passport from their country of residence, and their overseas Chinese status certificate for conscription purposes. They must also make photocopies of their identity document page and the overseas Chinese status certificate for conscription purposes.

zh-TW: 僑民役男在通過出境核准後，會在中華民國(臺灣)護照上蓋出境核准證明印，於有效期限內可自由出入境中華民國自由地區(臺灣地區)。
en-US: After being approved for exit, overseas conscripts will have an exit approval stamp affixed to their Republic of China (Taiwan) passports, allowing them to freely enter and exit the free areas (Taiwan/Kinmen/Mazu(Lianjiang)) of the Republic of China (Taiwan) within the validity period.

zh-TW: 若出境核准證明過期，但役政用華僑身分證明書尚未過期，則可逕自內政部移民署各地服務站重新臨櫃申請出境核准。
en-US: If the exit permit has expired, but the overseas Chinese identity certificate for military service has not expired, you can apply for exit permit again in person at any of the National Immigration Agency's service centers.

zh-TW: 承辦單位可協助辦理申請，但請於活動開始前向承辦單位提出需求，活動正式開始後概不受理。
en-US: The organizer can assist with the application process, but please submit your request to the organizer before the event begins. Applications will not be accepted after the event has officially started.

en-US: If you are worried about losing your passport or other documents, you can take a photo of it with your phone beforehand or make a paper copy. In case you need to see a doctor, you can use the copy or your Taiwan National Health Insurance card. However, if you need to apply for a data card (if a parent accompanies you, the parent can collect the data card after it is processed), you can apply for a data card.

zh-TW: 除非需要大量購買臺灣名產，否則零用錢建議攜帶新臺幣1,000-2,000元即可，或是悠遊卡儲值1,000元，現金1,000元亦可。
en-US: Unless you need to buy a lot of Taiwanese specialties, it is recommended to carry NT$1,000-2,000 for spending money, or NT$1,000 in EasyCard or NT$1,000 in cash.

zh-TW: 因為報到後的晚上有些注意事項還要跟志工們說明，原則上不希望志工報到後離開臺北醫學大學，報到後我們有責任維護每位志工和工作人員的安全。
en-US: There are some precautions to take that need to be explained to the volunteers on the evening after they arrive. In principle, we do not want volunteers to leave Taipei Medical University after they arrive. We have a responsibility to protect the safety of every volunteer and staff member after they arrive.

zh-TW: 其實我們並不是要限制志工的行動或說是"管制"志工，畢竟志工來臺灣人生地不熟，加上我們有責任維護參加這個活動的每個人的安全，雖然臺灣的治安算很好，但不怕一萬只怕萬一，所以麻煩各位家長，協助主辦單位(僑務委員會)跟志工們說明，營隊期間的規則和要求都是為了活動順利和大家的安全，沒有工作人員帶領下請勿私自離開營隊活動區域，也切勿飲酒，就算年滿18歲也一樣(因為團體內還有很多未滿17歲的志工，擔心會有渲染效應...難以管理)，志工來臺是為了服務...為了增加生活經驗和學習，希望各位家長和志工能夠諒解，謝謝。
en-US: Actually, we don't intend to restrict or "control" the volunteers. After all, the volunteers are unfamiliar with Taiwan, and we have a responsibility to ensure the safety of everyone participating in this activity. Although Taiwan has a good public safety record, we're always prepared for the worst. Therefore, we ask all parents to assist the organizers (Overseas Chinese Affairs Commission) in explaining to the volunteers that the rules and requirements during the camp are for the smooth running of the event and everyone's safety. Please do not leave the camp activity area without the guidance of staff, and please do not drink alcohol, even if you are 18 years or older (because there are many volunteers under the age of 17 in the group, and we are worried about the potential for a negative impact... making them difficult to manage). The volunteers come to Taiwan to serve... to gain life experience and learn. We hope that all parents and volunteers can understand. Thank you.

zh-TW: 報到須知
en-US: Registration Guideline

zh-TW: 參與志工請務必遵守以下規定：
en-US: Please read the following information carefully and comply with all relevant requirements.

zh-TW: 活動時間
en-US: Event Date and Time

zh-TW: 2026年7月4日(星期六)至7月31日(星期五)
en-US: Saturday, July 4th to Friday, July 31st, 2026

zh-TW: 海外志工航班及生活調查事項表
en-US: Pre-Arrival Survey

zh-TW: 請於5月10日(星期日)前完成填寫表單，並上傳機票影本或購票證明、健康證明表、醫療保險證明影印本(可申請海外就醫給付之醫療保險)、肖像授權同意書及錄取志工行前通知注意事項各1份(須經申請人與家長簽章)
en-US: Please complete the form by Sunday, May 10, and upload the arrival flight information with a copy of purchased airline ticket, Health Certificate, copy of medical insurance (must cover overseas medical treatment), consent form for portrait rights and Pre-Departure Notice (signed by the applicant and his/her parents).

zh-TW: 填寫連結：https://forms.gle/jHoaFoba1BuV9Vws9
en-US: Form Link：https://forms.gle/jHoaFoba1BuV9Vws9

zh-TW: 附件1：健康證明表
en-US: Appendix 1:Health Certificate

zh-TW: 附件2：肖像授權同意書
en-US: Appendix 2:Consent form for portrait rights

zh-TW: 附件3：錄取志工行前通知注意事項
en-US: Appendix 3:Pre-Departure Notice

zh-TW: 接機報到
en-US: Airport Pick-up Registration

zh-TW: 接機地點：桃園國際機場第一航廈入境大廳與第二航廈入境大廳
en-US: Pick-up Location: Arrival Halls of Terminal 1 and Terminal 2, Taoyuan International Airport
Airport Pick-up Time in Taiwan: Saturday, July 4, 9:00AM–5:00PM
Contact Person: Ms. Chen Hsiu-chun, Lulala Travel Agency (Mobile: +886-937-071035)

zh-TW: 欲至機場報到者，請於調查表內提供已確認之抵臺班機時刻，由承辦單位(嚕啦啦旅行社)派車接送；將視志工航班抵達情形安排接駁車班，非隨到隨接駁。
en-US: Participants who wish to be picked up at the airport are requested to provide their confirmed arrival flight information in advance in the “Pre-Arrival Survey”. Pick-up transportation will be arranged by the organizer, Lulala Travel Agency. Shuttle service will be scheduled based on the actual arrival times of volunteers’ flights and will not be provided on an immediate, walk-in basis.

zh-TW: 接機人員將持明顯手舉牌利於辨識
en-US: Airport pick-up staff will hold clearly visible signs for easy identification.

zh-TW: 如有其他需求請事前告知，以利承辦單位聯絡安排。
en-US: If you have other needs, please inform the organizer in ad-vance so that proper arrangements can be made.

zh-TW: 自行報到
en-US: Self-Registration

zh-TW: 報到地點：臺北醫學大學(信義校區) 臺北市信義區吳興街250號
en-US: Registration Venue: Taipei Medical University (Xinyi Campus) No. 250, Wuxing St., Xinyi Dist., Taipei City 110301, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
Registration Time (Taiwan Time): Saturday, July 4, 2:00PM–6:00PM
Contact Person: Mr. Chen Lin-chun, Lulala Travel Agency (Mobile: +886-935-261165)

zh-TW: 親友自行接送至臺北醫學大學(信義校區)者，請攜個人必須物品及行李於上述報到時間內前往報到。報到時請出示護照等文件，報到後以團體活動為主，請勿自行離團活動。
en-US: For those who will be dropped off at Taipei Medical University (Xinyi Campus) by family or friends, please make sure to bring all necessary luggage and complete the check-in process within the designated time. During check-in, please present your passport and other required documents. After checking in, participants will primarily follow group activities and are requested not to leave the group on their own.

zh-TW: 延遲報到者：請親友另行向承辦單位連絡。
en-US: Participants who expect to arrive late should contact the organizer in advance so that the necessary arrangements can be made.

zh-TW: 攜帶物品
en-US: Items to Bring

zh-TW: 護照
en-US: Passport

zh-TW: 個人盥洗用品、浴巾、慣用藥品、換洗衣物
en-US: Personal toiletries, a bath towel, personal medications, and a change of clothes.

zh-TW: 個人運動服裝及球鞋
en-US: Sportswear and athletic shoes.

zh-TW: 其他個人需用物品(筆電、零用錢、雨傘、手機、充電器等)
en-US: Other personal items (laptop, spending money, umbrella, mobile phone, charger, etc.)

zh-TW: 生活公約說明會將於抵臺後舉辦
en-US: The orientation will be held after your arrival in Taiwan.

zh-TW: 教育訓練週採分組設計教案，且各服務學校教案採紙本、道具或電子化不一，請自行評估是否需攜帶筆電。
en-US: participants will develop lesson plans in groups. As lesson plan formats at each service school may differ (paper-based, with teaching aids, or electronic), participants are advised to assess and prepare notebook accordingly.

zh-TW: 主辦單位將提供每人制服3件短袖T-shirt、帽子、旅行袋、杯子、文具、便利雨衣、簡易盥洗包。
en-US: Each participant will receive three short-sleeved uniform T-shirts, one cap, one travel bag, one cup, stationery, dispos-able rain poncho, and one basic toiletry kit.

zh-TW: 志工使命
en-US: Volunteer Mission

zh-TW: 本影片係提供海外青年英語服務營志工來臺前先行閱覽，培養對志工服務精神及英語服務營的正確認知，影片分為3部份，並於課程結束後記得完成線上評量。
en-US: This video is intended for overseas youth English service camp volunteers to watch before coming to Taiwan, to cultivate a correct understanding of the spirit of volunteer service and the English service camp. The video is divided into 3 parts, and remember to complete the online assessment after the course ends.

en-US: Overseas volunteers are required to complete the life survey form.

zh-TW:
請各位參與海外青年英語服務營的志工務必於5/10(星期日)前完成填寫生活調查事項表。
(調查單連結已寄至各位報名志工的E-Mail信箱中，請務必在截止日期前填寫完成)
